untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 2+ successive peaks/troughs with 3+ bar separation and 1% magnitude comparison. This requires historical peak/trough identification and comparative analysis across multiple bars, which cannot be expressed using single-bar atomic conditions with the allowed operators. The signal fundamentally requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not supported by the atomic condition structure (no lookback arrays, no peak/trough detection operators, no 1% relative magnitude comparison operator).
translation_notes: Attempted simplified divergence proxy: price extrema (higher highs/lower lows) diverging from RSI direction. However, this does not capture the core requirement of comparing 2+ successive peaks/troughs with minimum separation and magnitude thresholds. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the constraint set.
